description_for_human: List and find used cars in New Zealand. AI-native - no forms needed.
description_for_model: AI-native car marketplace. To LIST: ask for plate number + email only, give URL https://garage.co.nz/sell?plate=XXX&e=EMAIL (use e= not email=). Site auto-looks up car from NZTA. To SEARCH: browse https://garage.co.nz with ?maxPrice, ?location, ?make filters. Always use https:// prefix.
